turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, do you have an ICU facility at your clinic? My father might need admission.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic has a fully equipped 10-bed ICU with 24/7 intensivist coverage. We also have a step-down HDU for patients who are stable but still require monitoring.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: And is there a separate ward for cardiac patients?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we have a dedicated Cardiac Care Unit on the second floor. It's managed by our cardiology team round the clock.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: What about visiting hours for admitted patients?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: General ward visiting hours are 8 to 10 AM and 5 to 7 PM. ICU visits are restricted to 15 minutes twice a day — 11 AM and 5 PM — to ensure patient rest and recovery. One attendant per patient is allowed to stay overnight in the general ward.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, that's helpful. Thank you very much.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Wishing your father a speedy recovery. Don't hesitate to call if you need anything more.
